pundits.name: Eric Wynalda
pundits.take: Let me make this simple: Gayden is the only one of these four who belongs at the table, and 6 points proves it. Zach at 4 is coasting on a Brazil draw he had nothing to do with. And Devin? Zero points. ZERO. You drafted Haiti and South Africa and then acted surprised when they got beat — that's not bad luck, that's not watching a single match. This is a joke.

pundits.name: Landon Donovan
pundits.take: Look, I think Gayden's having a nice little run, though I'd gently point out he didn't really do anything — Korea Republic and Turkey won in spite of him. And I feel for Devin, I really do, but when you sit at zero and your big swings were South Africa and Haiti... I mean, bless his heart, what conversation was he having with himself on draft night? Gunner means well at 1 point. He does.

pundits.name: Clint Dempsey
pundits.take: Gayden out here at 6 lookin' like he backed himself — credit where it's due, boy's puttin' in work. Meanwhile Devin's sittin' on a goose egg 'cause he drafted Haiti like he got a tip from his fantasy group chat. That's tough, man. Gunner gettin' cooked with that 1 point too — Morocco draw ain't gonna save ya.

pundits.name: Alexi Lalas
pundits.take: Devin. DEVIN. Look at me. You have ZERO points and you want to talk to me about the beautiful game? You drafted Bosnia and Haiti and called it a strategy. Let me tell you something — Gayden's 6 points isn't greatness, it's the bare minimum, and the rest of you should be embarrassed to share a group chat with him. This is what a lack of preparation looks like, gentlemen. Mic drop.
